title: Yow`ezer #3134
definition:
Joezer = "Jehovah is help"

 1) a Korhite, one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag
nasbUsage:
Definition: Joezer = "Jehovah is help"

 1) a Korhite, one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag

    NASB:  the LORD is a help, one of Davids mighty men
